channel.title: Social Media on Liu Qiran
channel.description: Recent content in Social Media on Liu Qiran

item.title: Mastodon
item.description:
﻿Removed some plugins from my blog. Added options for foreign languages.
Added the Mastodon icon and removed the YouTube icon.
Tried out Mastodon, a decentralized social networking software. I think it is a good alternative to Twitter.
item.content:encoded:
﻿Removed some plugins from my blog. Added options for foreign languages.
Added the Mastodon icon and removed the YouTube icon.
Tried out Mastodon, a decentralized social networking software. I think it is a good alternative to Twitter.

item.title: Connection
item.description:
﻿

Hold my hand
I’m real powerless to fight
Can you lead me to the light?
My strenght has come to fear
Fled in truth of dawn
Curious as a day
My heart huh woah oh

Can you bring me back to life?
Ignite the fire again?
Can you bring me back home where I am not alone?
I’m lost inside, the night and I cannot find you
Bring me back
item.content:encoded:
﻿

Hold my hand
I’m real powerless to fight
Can you lead me to the light?
My strenght has come to fear
Fled in truth of dawn
Curious as a day
My heart huh woah oh

Can you bring me back to life?
Ignite the fire again?
Can you bring me back home where I am not alone?
I’m lost inside, the night and I cannot find you
Bring me back

Meet me at the levee
All the tears I’ve shed
Before it brights upon my head oh uh oh

Can you bring me back to life?
Ignite the fire again?
Can you bring me back home where I am not alone?
I’m lost inside, the night and I cannot find you

Bring me back

成癮的反面不是清醒，而是連接。

在這個互聯網的時代，人與人的連接似乎變得越來越容易，但是我們慢慢失去了對人、對事建立深層連結的能力，取而代之的是無盡的信息推送，社交媒體 的動態，短視頻、遊戲。我們卻愈發孤獨，只能戴上面具 狂歡。

如果沒有真正的，深層的連接，我們會很容易墮入到無意義的連結——一種成癮的狀態當中。建立深層的連接——養成一個好習慣、維繫一個長久的關係，都不是一件容易的事情。也許我們自己能做到，也許我們需要外界的幫助。
